When the Moon moves to the north of Jupiter, prosperity
will dawn on kings defending their towns, Brahmanas, Ksatriyas,
learned men, righteousness or religion, and the middle country.
There will be plenty of food and happiness among the people,
[The metre is wrrftr,]
When the Moon is to the north of Venus, those who have
hoarded wealth, elephants and horses will flourish, marching
chiefs and archers will be victorious and there will be a bumper
harvest.
[The metre is T«fts<fT.]
xfaw 5T5ft SRfevf I
Should the Moon traverse to the north of Saturn, kings de-
fending a town would win victory, and ihe Scythians, Bahlikas,
people of Sindhu, Pahlavas and Yavanas would be happy.
[The metre is fcrrata.]
